samples.xml_description: Implement a module for edge detection. Clock signal. Reset signal (active low). Input signal. Output signal indicating a rising edge. Output signal indicating a falling edge. None. Previous value of input signal a. Delay for rising edge detection. Delay for falling edge detection. Always block for edge detection logic: always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin if (!rst_n) begin a_prev <= 1'b0; rise_delay <= 1'b0; down_delay <= 1'b0; end else begin a_prev <= a; if (a_prev == 1'b0 && a == 1'b1) begin rise_delay <= 1'b1; end else if (a_prev == 1'b1 && a == 1'b0) begin down_delay <= 1'b1; end else begin rise_delay <= 1'b0; down_delay <= 1'b0; end end end Assign statements for output logic: assign rise = rise_delay; assign down = down_delay;
